features: 100% ORGANIC ROSEHIP OIL - USDA ORGANIC CERTIFIED: Elevate your beauty routine with our elegantly packaged Organic Rosehip Oil for the Face. Housed in a refined bottle with a precise dropper, our oil ensures effortless and controlled application, enhancing your skin's health and youthfulness

For Scars and Anti-aging: Packed with vitamins A, C, and E, this Rosehip Seed Oil is a versatile antioxidant. It moisturizes, fights aging, and reduces inflammation naturally, helps to remove scars, and is ideal as a carrier oil for serums, face oil, and more

SKIN BENEFITS: Gently massage our Rose Face Oil onto your face for fine line reduction, even skin tone, and a radiant glow. Suitable for all skin types, it offers a chemical-free daily skincare solution

Revitalize Your Hair: Nourish and revitalize hair, bidding farewell to dryness. Apply to ends or mix with conditioner for a spa-like hair treatment at home. Our Nourishing oil adds a healthy shine, strengthens hair, and prevents split ends

Our Promise of Quality: At Kanzy, we ensure premium quality with our 100% Pure rosehip oil, vegan and cruelty-free. Experience luxury with our Body Oil, providing hydration, a silky feel, and a delicate scent. It's more than a moisturizer; it fades stretch marks and scars, leaving your skin smooth and rejuvenated

Can this be used in hair? Yes, mix a few drops with your shampoo or conditioner. This works well to give your hair more moisture and better nutrition. It heals and rejuvenates scalp for a richer, younger look. Should I mix with something else before using on face and neck? You can use a few drops on face and neck. This is very gentle and will not harm the skin in small amounts. What does this smell like? Our pure Rosehip oil does not have perfumes or added ingredients to create aroma like others that aren't pure. This has the natural slightly sweet and nutty aroma of true Rosehip oil. Is this cruelty-free? Yes, this is pure plant-based with no testing or harm to animals. It's safe and natural for the environment. It's the all-natural herbal oil you can depend on for great results.
